scene_notes: Vertical biomechanical wet-metal spine/totem rebuilt with more anatomy-like vertebrae: beveled bodies, front bulges, dark recesses, rounded lips, side processes, and hook-like lower protrusions.
Dense cyan, magenta, blue, and green particle cloud surrounds the central column.
Dark cinematic web-hero composition with reflective highlights and subtle UI text hints.
Second revision focused specifically on making the central column read as a spine instead of smooth capsules.
